backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend state, types (UserProfile, Habit, Activity, PaymentRequest, Coupon), and authorization helpers for a habit-tracking app with plan-based access control, UPI payment requests, and coupon management.
feature_evidence.json: Maps each product feature (authentication, pricing, payment, dashboard, habits, analytics, admin) to the frontend/backend files and test IDs that implement them, serving as a traceability report.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, used as a quick reference for what each hook, page, component, and stylesheet does.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the full design-token system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the TrackFlow SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading the Vite/TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with an auth guard, protected layout wrapper, and all app routes (login, pricing, payment, dashboard, analytics, activities, habits, profile, admin).
frontend/src/components/activities/EditA: Dialog modal for editing an existing activity's habit, name, start/end times, earnings, productive flag, and notes, wired to the `useUpdateActivity` mutation with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponMana: Admin UI component for creating and deleting discount coupons, with a form for code, discount percent, usage limit, and expiry date, plus a list of existing coupons.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsQu: Admin UI component that displays pending payment requests and allows approving or rejecting them, showing user name, plan, cycle, coupon, and transaction details.
frontend/src/components/admin/PlatformSt: Admin dashboard widget that fetches and displays four platform-wide stats (total users, activities, habits, payment requests) as icon cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersTable: Admin table component listing all users with search filtering, principal copy, and an inline plan-change selector per user row.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Activi: Dashboard component that renders a chronological list of today's activities with inline edit (name and earnings) and delete capabilities.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AddAct: Dashboard form component for logging a new activity, accepting habit selection, custom name, start/end times, productivity flag, earnings, and notes for a given date.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/HabitP: Renders a progress bar for a single habit showing current vs. goal hours for the selected day or week, with completion indicator and percentage label.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StatsC: Displays a single statistic card with a label, value, icon, and color theme using a predefined color map for indigo, emerald, amber, and purple variants.
frontend/src/components/habits/HabitForm: Modal dialog for creating or editing a habit, with fields for name, goal type (daily/weekly), goal hours, and color selection, using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/habits/UpgradePl: Modal that informs users they've hit their plan's habit limit and presents Starter and Premium upgrade options with pricing, redirecting to the pricing page on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Simple footer component displaying copyright info and a referral link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters based on the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper that composes a collapsible Sidebar with a main content area and Footer, adjusting left margin based on sidebar collapsed state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: Collapsible sidebar with navigation links, admin-conditional menu item, logout functionality, and tooltip support for collapsed icon-only mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, habits, activities, payments, coupons, and admin operations using the ICP actor pattern.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter/Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a full OKLCH-based design token system for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActivitiesPage.tsx: Full-featured activities list page with filtering by habit/productivity/date, pagination, bulk delete, single delete, and an edit modal for individual activities.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page gated by an admin role check, displaying platform stats and tabbed sections for managing payments, users, and coupons.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Analytics page showing time distribution, daily earnings, and productivity charts via Recharts, with date range filtering and a paywall for non-free plan features.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page showing per-day stats (hours, earnings, productivity), a date picker, an add-activity form toggle, activity timeline, and habit progress bars.
frontend/src/pages/HabitsPage.tsx: Displays the user's habits list with add/edit/delete functionality, enforces plan-based habit limits, and shows an upgrade modal when the limit is reached.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing/login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity and redirects them to the pricing page upon successful login.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Handles UPI payment flow for plan upgrades, including coupon validation, price calculation, and submission of a payment request with a transaction ID.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Displays free/starter/premium plan options, handles new user profile setup, and routes users to the payment page or requests approval based on the selected plan.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows the user's profile details, activity/earnings stats, and provides options to edit phone number, export data as JSON, and delete the account.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing TrackFlow, a React/TypeScript/Motoko habit tracker with Internet Identity auth, INR UPI payments, manual admin plan verification, and features including Dashboard, Analytics, Habits, and an Admin panel.
